hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]]; then PKG=$(echo "$FILE" | grep -o 'packages/[^/]*'); if [ -n "$PKG" ]; then cd "$PKG" 2>/dev/null && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 && echo '✓ Types valid' || echo '✗ Type errors found'; fi; fi
echo '--- Schema changed: running full workspace type check ---' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -40 && echo '✓ All workspace types valid'

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'mainnet-beta\|solana-mainnet'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Solana mainnet access is prohibited. Use devnet only.' && exit 1; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'push --force\|push origin main'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push and direct push to main are not allowed.' && exit 1; fi
echo '--- Final type check ---' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 && echo '✓ Ready to commit'
